# Sciter SDK

Copy your Sciter SDK here:
- `include/` - Sciter headers (sciter-x.h, sciter-x-window.hpp, etc.)
- `lib/` - Sciter libraries (.lib files)
- `bin/` - (optional) sciter.dll for runtime

## Required Files
```
extern/sciter/
├── include/
│   ├── sciter-x.h
│   ├── sciter-x-window.hpp
│   └── ... (other headers)
└── lib/
    └── sciter.lib
```
